channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fallen tree with banches completely blocking the cycle lane, 17th March
item.description:
The tree is falling more and more. I went under it yesterday but did not notice it in time today and was wipped by it. This will make me sway into the main road on the way to work tomorrow.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A21, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large mattress dumped on bench, 17th March
item.description:
Hello, please could the mattress flytipped on the bench be removed asap please? It is taking up all the bench and people do use the bench to sit on. Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bromley council leaves bagged up but not collected, 17th March
item.description:
It’s great that the council have cleared the leaves and debris from the kerb but it would be much nicer if the bags could be collected before they are opened by animals and spread along the road again. They’ve been here for almost 2 weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Raymond Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 very deep Pot holes, 17th March
item.description:
These pot holes are getting much worse and will likely cause a serious accident to a motor cyclist or other road user soon. These pot holes have been there for several months.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Court Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 17th March
item.description:
By the green box and shrubs at the entrance to Tesco off Croydon Rd near the bus stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 bags of leaf waste in grey bags left lying here, 17th March
item.description:
Been here for weeks now, can they be removed by waste team please
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes down longleigh lane, which you cannot avoid when cars driving both ways, 17th March
item.description:
The multiple potholes down longleigh lane have been here for a couple of months now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longleigh Lane, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of nitrous oxide containers dumped, 17th March
item.description:
Saw these last Friday whilst visiting Eltham Palace - such a shame

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Court Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full bins, pucker required, 17th March
item.description:
The rubbish bins not being emptied so people started putting their dog poo bags on floor, glass bottle being left on floor. Ive pucked up and pushed in bins, but too late for one thats bern broke. Dangerous for our pets and us, ive sldo picked much of this up. Maybe you should pay me to be a pucker. Also Butt's wood needs a picker. Due to 2 schools i. Hutchins road its constantly used as dumping ground by students. As in hutchins road, the path leading to Butt's wood, some items bern there 2 weeks??

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterfield Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items dumped by Holford House, 17th March
item.description:
Items dumped on walkthrough between Holford House & Wilmington Terrace

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tenda Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Second report!, 17th March
item.description:
P1086 Still out!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 127, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items dumped in front of Pope House, 17th March
item.description:
Items dumped in front of entrance to block

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anchor Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items dumped by Trappes House, 17th March
item.description:
Items left by bin for collection

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ambrose Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes between road to crystal palace station and brunswick place in the middle of the road going down the hill not up, 17th March
item.description:
5-6 potholes in road increasing in size
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Middle of road as you drive up, 17th March
item.description:
Pothole increasing in size main bus route
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving stone wobbling with 2” lip, 17th March
item.description:
Loose paving stone outside a busy restaurant and close to a busy crossing. Significant trip hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich Church Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden rubbish dumped on the street, 17th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped all their garden rubbish on the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lampost not working agaim, 17th March
item.description:
This lamppost yet again has not been turning on at night for the past 2days. The alleyway is now very dark and with a history of crime and anti-social behaviour in this alleyway this issue needs to be addressed immediately. I no longer feel safe walking home at night. The lamppost is in the alleyway adjoining Landsdown Gardens just behind Thorne road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thorne Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 17th March
item.description:
Fly-tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13a, Finsbury Park Avenue, Harringay, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 17th March
item.description:
Graffiti on wall, if not removed will encourage more Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eastway, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
